sub_pixel_system.notes: RTS game - sub-pixel movement data not documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Unit Movement
special_mechanics.description: RTS-based unit control with queued commands and group selection via number keys. Unit movement speeds vary by faction and unit type.

physics_values.faction_differences: Soviet vehicles slower but more durable and powerful; Allied vehicles faster but less durable

special_mechanics.name: Naval Movement
special_mechanics.description: Soviet submarines can move invisibly underwater and surface to attack. Allied naval units include destroyers and gunboats.

special_mechanics.name: Air Movement
special_mechanics.description: Multiple aircraft types with different movement characteristics. Yak-9 and MiG-23 perform hit-and-run attacks; Mi-24 Hind is armored and remains in combat longer.

tier_notes: RTS game without player avatar. Movement parameters are unit-type specific and not quantified in available documentation. Physics extraction not applicable for this genre.
